items.desc_zh: 美国警告称，与古巴达成和平协议的可能性不大，哈瓦那坚称这是一起“欺诈案”，旨在为军事干预辩护。

items.title_en: Wall Street thinks IMAX is ripe for a sale. Here's who could buy it
items.title_zh: 华尔街认为出售 IMAX 的时机已经成熟。谁可以购买
items.desc_en: A source told CNBC that IMAX has held "preliminary talks" through intermediaries, but no official pitches have been made by the company.
items.desc_zh: 一位消息人士告诉 CNBC，IMAX 已通过中间人进行了“初步谈判”，但该公司尚未做出任何正式宣传。

items.title_en: Kevin Warsh's real Fed 'regime change' may happen deep inside Wall Street's plumbing
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什真正的美联储“政权更迭”可能发生在华尔街的管道深处
items.desc_en: Warsh could guide to a smaller role in day-to-day markets, while also setting clearer rules for how and when it should intervene.
items.desc_zh: 沃什可以引导其在日常市场中发挥较小的作用，同时就如何以及何时进行干预制定更明确的规则。

items.title_en: Here's the case for 9,000 on the S&P 500 by the middle of next year, according to JPMorgan
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，到明年年中，标准普尔 500 指数将出现 9,000 点的情况
items.desc_en: Higher productivity could be even more supportive of the stock market than previously thought.
items.desc_zh: 更高的生产率可能比之前想象的更能支持股市。

items.title_en: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争加剧通胀担忧，五月消费者信心创历史新低
items.desc_en: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.
items.desc_zh: 由于美伊战争和油价上涨，人们对价格上涨的担忧加剧，5 月份消费者信心跌至历史新低。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.desc_zh: 本周股票和债券市场的波动性加剧。

items.title_en: Ebola risk raised to 'very high' in DR Congo
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国埃博拉风险升至“非常高”
items.desc_en: The head of the UN health agency says the risk in the wider region is "high", but it remains "low" at the global level.
items.desc_zh: 联合国卫生机构负责人表示，更广泛地区的风险“高”，但在全球范围内仍然“低”。

items.title_en: Sabalenka cuts media short as French Open players protest
items.title_zh: 萨巴伦卡因法网球员抗议而缩短媒体时间
items.desc_en: Leading players, including Aryna Sabalenka, Coco Gauff and Jannik Sinner, limit their French Open media duties to 15 minutes in a row over prize money.
items.desc_zh: 包括阿琳娜·萨巴伦卡 (Aryna Sabalenka)、可可·高夫 (Coco Gauff) 和詹尼克·辛纳 (Jannik Sinner) 在内的领先选手将他们的法网媒体职责限制为连续 15 分钟的奖金。

items.title_en: Trump defends DOJ fund after Senate Republicans push back
items.title_zh: 在参议院共和党人反对后，特朗普捍卫司法部基金
items.desc_en: President Trump droppped his $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS in exchange for the DOJ creating a $1.8 billion fund to compensate alleged "lawfare" victims.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统放弃了针对国税局 100 亿美元的诉讼，以换取司法部设立 18 亿美元的基金来赔偿所谓的“法律”受害者。

items.title_en: Alberta Will Vote on a Possible Referendum to Separate From Canada. Here’s What to Know. - The New York Times

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。

items.title_en: Donald Trump Jr.-backed 'Steroid Olympics' are happening on Sunday. Here's what to expect
items.title_zh: 小唐纳德·特朗普支持的“类固醇奥运会”将于周日举行。这是值得期待的
items.desc_en: Olympic medallists are among 42 athletes competing in the controversial competition, but the Enhanced Games has big product plans beyond the event this weekend.
items.desc_zh: 42 名运动员参加了这项备受争议的比赛，其中包括奥运会奖牌得主，但增强型运动会在本周末的赛事之外还有大型产品计划。

items.title_en: An Indian bride dies. Rival claims of murder and suicide set off media frenzy
items.title_zh: 一名印度新娘去世。谋杀和自杀的相互指控引发了媒体的狂热
items.desc_en: Twisha Sharma, a model and actor, had been married for just five months when she was found dead.
items.desc_zh: 模特兼演员特威莎·夏尔马 (Twisha Sharma) 被发现死亡时，她刚刚结婚五个月。

items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。
